_doc: Golden pairs for V5-0 judgmental-match second-pass verification regression. Each entry is a (大绿本判断型匹配, expected verdict) that a human pre-confirmed. After agent dispatch (harness side; see semantic-match/RUN_VERIFY.md), the main session asserts >=95% certainty threshold AND that the 投资学(量化投资) counter-example judges 存疑. This file is NOT consumed by CI (test_verify_golden_certainty_threshold is @pytest.mark.manual and skips). Real values are filled in during the main session once verify_*_result.jsonl exist; the schema below is the contract.

pairs.dimension: 同名同方向，核心名唯一
方向不同：量化投资≠投资学（V5-0 核心反例）
pairs._note: 这是 grilling 决策的核心反例 —— 核心名唯一会误匹配带方向的裸名，必须判存疑。
